question.text: Under which section of the SEBI Act does SEBI have the power to direct disgorgement of wrongful gains?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Section 11B empowers SEBI to issue directions to intermediaries if an enquiry reveals investor interests are at stake. This includes the power to direct any person who made a profit or averted loss by contravening the SEBI Act to disgorge an amount equivalent to the wrongful gain made or loss averted. **The Trap:** Section 11(4) deals with interim measures like trading suspension and asset attachment. Disgorgement is specifically under Section 11B. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Disgorged amounts go to the Investor Protection and Education Fund (IPEF) established by SEBI under Section 11(5).
